website_content.title: PSSSB Clerk Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Clerk Syllabus 2026

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the detailed syllabus for the Clerk Exam 2026. This guide covers the exam pattern, marking scheme, and subject-wise topics.

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** PSSSB Clerk Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB)
*   **Post Name:** Clerk
*   **Exam Mode:** Online (Computer-Based Test)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 150
*   **Total Marks:** 150
*   **Exam Duration:** 150 Minutes
*   **Negative Marking:** Yes - 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer
*   **Selection Process:** Written Exam (CBT) + Document Verification + Typing Test (if applicable)
*   **Exam Language:** English / Punjabi

**Exam Pattern:**

| Subject/Section             | No. of Questions | Marks | 
| --------------------------- | ---------------- | ----- |
| General Knowledge / Awareness | 25               | 25    |
| Punjab History and Culture   | 17               | 17    |
| Logical Reasoning            | 25               | 25    |
| Punjabi Language             | 50               | 50    |
| Punjabi                     | 13               | 13    |
| English                     | 12               | 12    |
| ICT                         | 08               | 08    |
| **Total**                   | **150**          | **150** |

**Key Topics:**

*   **General Knowledge:** Current Affairs, Indian History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science, Punjab GK.
*   **Logical Reasoning:** Analogies, Puzzles, Coding-Decoding.
*   **Mathematics:** Percentage, Ratio, Profit & Loss.
*   **Punjabi:** Grammar, Muhavare, Vakyansh.
*   **English:** Comprehension, Error Detection, Vocabulary.

**Preparation Tips:**

*   Understand the syllabus and exam pattern.
*   Create a study timetable.
*   Practice previous year papers.
*   Take mock tests.
*   Focus on Punjab GK and Punjabi.

1.  Visit the official website: www.ibps.in

website_content.title: HPCL Engineer Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## HPCL Engineer Syllabus 2026

Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has released the detailed syllabus and exam pattern for Engineer posts in various disciplines for recruitment 2026. 

**Exam Overview:**

*   **Exam Name:** HPCL Engineer Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL)
*   **Post Name:** Engineer (Mechanical, Electrical, Civil, Industrial, etc.)
*   **Exam Mode:** Online (Computer-Based Test - CBT)
*   **Exam Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 170
*   **Total Marks:** 170
*   **Exam Duration:** 150 Minutes (2 Hours 30 Minutes)
*   **Negative Marking:** No Negative Marking
*   **Selection Process:** CBT + Group Task + Interview
*   **Exam Language:** English

**Syllabus Breakdown:**

*   **Section I (85 Questions, 85 Marks):** General Aptitude (Logical Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, English Language)
*   **Section II (85 Questions, 85 Marks):** Technical / Professional Knowledge (Discipline-specific - Mechanical, Electrical, Civil, Instrumentation, Chemical)

**Key Topics:**

*   **General Aptitude:** Data Interpretation, Logical Reasoning, Reading Comprehension, Percentage & Ratio
*   **Technical:** Core subjects from respective engineering branch (focus on numerical & conceptual questions).

**Important Note:** Always refer to the official notification on [hindustanpetroleum.com](https://hindustanpetroleum.com) for the most up-to-date syllabus and exam pattern.

**Download Syllabus PDFs:**

*   [HPCL Chemical Engineering Syllabus 2026 PDF](link_placeholder_chemical)

website_content.title: DSSSB SSA (Chemistry) Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## DSSSB SSA (Chemistry) Result 2026 OUT! 

The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released the result for the Senior Scientific Assistant (Chemistry) – Post Code 17/25 on **20 February 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** DSSSB
*   **Post Name:** Senior Scientific Assistant (Chemistry) / SSA (Chemistry) - Post Code 17/25
*   **Result Type:** Written Examination Result / Shortlisted Candidates Notice
*   **Declaration Date:** 20 February 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 11 December 2025 (Multiple Shifts)
*   **Selection Stages:** Written Test (Tier-I) → Document Verification / E-Dossier → Further Process
*   **Official Website:** [dsssb.delhi.gov.in](dsssb.delhi.gov.in)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit [dsssb.delhi.gov.in](dsssb.delhi.gov.in).
2.  Go to the 'Latest Result' section.
3.  Find NOTICE NO: 134 - POST: SENIOR SCIENTIFIC ASSISTANT (CHEMISTRY) POST CODE-17/25.
4.  Download the PDF result notice.
5.  Search for your Roll Number / Name.
6.  Login to OARS module ([dsssbonline.nic.in](dsssbonline.nic.in)) for marks/scorecard (if available).

**Merit List Information:**
The merit list contains Roll Number, Candidate Name, Father's Name, Category, Marks Obtained, and Qualifying Status. Separate lists are available for reserved categories and a waiting list may be prepared.

**Scorecard Information:**
Scorecards (if available) will display Candidate Name, Roll Number, Exam Date, Marks Obtained, Qualifying Status, and Category Rank.

website_content.title: India Post GDS Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## India Post GDS Result 2026

The India Post GDS Result 2026 is anticipated to be released soon on the official portal [indiapostgdsonline.gov.in](https://indiapostgdsonline.gov.in/). The result will be in the form of state-wise or circle-wise merit list PDFs for the Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS), Branch Postmaster (BPM), and Assistant Branch Postmaster (ABPM) recruitment under Online Engagement Schedule-I, January 2026.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Department of Posts (India Post)
*   **Post Name:** Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS), BPM, ABPM
*   **Selection Method:** Merit-based on Class 10 marks (no exam or interview)
*   **Result Mode:** Online PDF (circle/state-wise)
*   **Expected Release Date:** Late February or early March 2026
*   **Official Website:** [indiapostgdsonline.gov.in](https://indiapostgdsonline.gov.in/)

The application process has concluded, and scrutiny of applications is underway. Candidates are advised to regularly check the official portal for updates. The merit list will include details like Registration Number, Candidate Name, Postal Division/Circle, Category, Marks/Percentage, and Document Verification Status.

website_content.title: KRCL Trainee Apprentices Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## KRCL Trainee Apprentices Recruitment 2026

Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) is seeking applications for Trainee Apprentices under the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973. This is a one-year training opportunity for Graduate and Technician Apprentices who passed out between 2021-2025.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL)
*   **Post Name:** Trainee Apprentices (Graduate/Technician)
*   **No. of Vacancies:** 190
*   **Job Type:** Apprenticeship Training
*   **Training Duration:** 1 Year
*   **Qualification:** BE/BTech/Diploma in relevant Engineering Branches or General Graduation (Passed 2021-2025)
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Selection Process:** Merit List (Aggregate Marks), Document Verification
*   **Job Location:** Maharashtra, Goa, Karnataka

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Release:** 20/02/2026
*   **Online Application Start:** 20/02/2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 21/03/2026

**Vacancy Breakdown:**

*   Civil Engineering: 30
*   Electrical Engineering: 20
*   Electronics Engineering: 10
*   Mechanical Engineering: 20
*   Diploma (Civil): 30
*   Diploma (Electrical): 20
*   Diploma (Electronics): 10
*   Diploma (Mechanical): 20
*   General Stream Graduates: 30

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Age Limit:** 18-25 years (Relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC-NCL)
*   Valid NATS ID required.
*   No prior/current apprenticeship.

**Application Fee:**

*   ₹100 for General/OBC-NCL/EWS
*   Nil for SC/ST/Female/Minorities

**Stipend:**

*   Graduate Apprentices: ₹9,000/month
*   Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: ₹8,000/month

*   **Organization:** Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC)

*   **Number of Posts:** 61

*   **Qualification:** ITI Pass-Out in Relevant Trade

website_content.title: MPESB Group 1 Sub Group 2 Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## MPESB Group 1 Sub Group 2 Answer Key 2026 Released

The Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board (MPESB) has released the provisional answer key for the Group 1 Sub Group 2 examination held on **17 February 2026**. Candidates can download the answer key PDF from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board (MPESB)
*   **Post Name:** Group 1 Sub Group 2
*   **Total Vacancies:** 474
*   **Exam Date:** 17 February 2026
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 23 February 2026
*   **Last Date to Raise Objection:** 26 February 2026
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹XX per question (refundable if accepted)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: esb.mp.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Click on the "Group 1 Sub Group 2 Answer Key 2026" link.
4.  Log in using your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download and save the PDF.

**How to Raise Objection:**

1.  Log in to your candidate portal on esb.mp.gov.in
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) you want to challenge.
4.  Upload supporting documents (if required).
5.  Pay the objection fee.
6.  Submit before the deadline.

website_content.markdown_content:
## RPSC Junior Chemist & Assistant Electrical Inspector Answer Key 2026 Released! 

The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has released the answer key for the Junior Chemist and Assistant Electrical Inspector examination held on **February 1, 2026**. Candidates can download the answer key PDF from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC)
*   **Post Name:** Junior Chemist & Assistant Electrical Inspector
*   **Total Vacancies:** 22
*   **Exam Date:** February 1, 2026
*   **Answer Key Released:** February 23, 2026
*   **Objection Last Date:** February 27, 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in](rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Click on the relevant answer key link.
4.  Log in with your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth (if required).
5.  Download and save the PDF.

**Objection Process:**

1.  Log in to your candidate portal on rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in.
2.  Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge.
4.  Upload supporting documents (if required).
5.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
6.  Submit before February 27, 2026.

**Scoring:**

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

website_content.title: OPSC AAO Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## OPSC AAO Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) has released the provisional answer key for the Assistant Agriculture Officer (AAO) exam held on **19 February 2026** (Paper I: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM; Paper II: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM).

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 118
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 23 February 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** 2 March 2026 (12:00 Noon)
*   **Exam Date:** 19 February 2026

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [www.opsc.gov.in](www.opsc.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "What’s New" or "Latest Updates" section.
3.  Click on the "OPSC AAO Answer Key 2026" link.
4.  Download the PDF for Sets A, B, C, and D.

**How to Raise Objections:**

1.  Visit [http://opscechayan.in](http://opscechayan.in)
2.  Log in to your candidate portal.
3.  Go to the "Objection / Suggestion" section.
4.  Select the question(s) and provide justification.
5.  Submit before the deadline: 2 March 2026 (12:00 Noon).

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.title: HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainees 2026-27
website_content.markdown_content:
## HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026-27 (Refineries Division)

Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) - Refineries Division is seeking Graduate Apprentice Trainees in Engineering streams under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) - Refineries Division
*   **Post Name:** Graduate Apprentice Trainees (Engineering)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 250
*   **Job Type:** Apprenticeship Training
*   **Training Duration:** 1 Year
*   **Qualification:** BE/BTech in relevant discipline (Passed after 01.04.2023)
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Selection Process:** Merit-Based Screening, Document Verification
*   **Job Location:** Mumbai Refinery (Maharashtra), Visakh Refinery (Andhra Pradesh)

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Release:** Prior to 25 February 2026
*   **Online Application Start:** 25 February 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 10 March 2026

**Vacancy Breakdown:**

*   Mumbai Refinery - Maharashtra: 120
*   Visakh Refinery - Andhra Pradesh: 130

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   Full-time Engineering Graduation from AICTE/UGC recognized university.
*   Completed after 01.04.2023.
*   Minimum Marks: 60% (UR/OBC-NC/EWS), 50% (SC/ST/PwBD).
*   Age Limit (as on 10.03.2026): 18-25 years (Relaxation applicable).

**Stipend:** ₹25,000 per month (₹20,500 by HPCL + ₹4,500 by GOI).

**How to Apply:**

1.  Register on NATS 2.0 portal and get BOAT approval.
2.  Apply online through the HPCL recruitment portal.

website_content.title: CGPSC SSE Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## CGPSC SSE Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has released the provisional answer key for the State Service Examination (SSE) 2026 preliminary exam.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Date:** 22nd February 2026
*   **Answer Key Release Date:** 23rd February 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** 3rd March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 239
*   **Objection Fee:** ₹50 per question (refundable if accepted)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [psc.cg.gov.in](psc.cg.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Model Answer" or "Answer Key" section.
3.  Download the PDF.

**How to Raise an Objection:**

1.  Visit [psc.cg.gov.in](psc.cg.gov.in)
2.  Log in to your candidate portal (if required).
3.  Go to the "Objection" or "Challenge" section.
4.  Select the question(s) and upload supporting documents.
5.  Pay the objection fee and submit before the deadline.

**Marking Scheme:**

*   Correct Answer: +2 marks
*   Wrong Answer: -0.66 mark
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.title: BPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## BPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026

**Company:** Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC)

**Post Name:** Assistant Prosecution Officer (Abhiyojan Padadhikari)

**No. of Posts:** 300

**Advt No:** 13/2026

**Salary:** Pay Level-9 (as per 7th Pay Commission)

**Qualification:** Law Graduate (LLB) with eligibility for Advocate registration

**Age Limit:** 21-37 years (UR Male) as on 01.08.2026 (relaxations applicable - BC/EBC (Male/Female) & UR Female: 40 years, SC/ST (Male/Female): 42 years).

**Start Date:** 27.02.2026

**Last Date:** 20.03.2026

**Website:** www.bpsc.bihar.gov.in

**Vacancy Details:**

| Category | Total Posts |
|---|---| 
| Unreserved | 129 |
| Women (35% Horizontal) | 41 |
| EWS | 29 |
| SC | 42 |
| ST | 07 |
| EBC | 64 |
| BC | 25 |
| BC Women | 04 |
| **Total** | **300** |

Freedom Fighters Grandchildren: 06 posts (Horizontal)
PwBD (Horizontal): VI-03, DD-03, OH-03, MD-03

**Selection Process:**

*   Preliminary Exam: 2 Objective Papers (GS-100 marks, Law-150 marks)
*   Main Exam: 8 Descriptive Papers (Total 1000 marks)
*   Interview: 100 marks

**How to Apply:**

1.  Register on OTR: https://bpsconline.bihar.gov.in
2.  Fill online application form and upload documents.
3.  Pay application fee online.
4.  Take printout of filled application.

website_content.title: DFCCIL MTS PET Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
**DFCCIL MTS PET Admit Card 2026 OUT!**

Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited (DFCCIL) has released the admit card for the Physical Efficiency Test (PET) for candidates who qualified in Stage-II CBT for the Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) post (Advt No. 01/DR/2025).

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 24 February 2026
*   **PET Date:** 12-13 March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 464 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** 01/DR/2025

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: dfccil.com
2.  Navigate to the "Careers" or "Recruitment" section.
3.  Click on the link for "Download E-Admit Card for Physical Efficiency Test (PET) for the post of MTS against Advt. No. 01/DR/2025".
4.  Enter your User ID/Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download and print the admit card.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Printed Admit Card
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent Passport-size Photographs (2 copies)

**PET Standards:**

*   **Male:** Lift & carry 35 kg for 100m in 2 min; Run 1000m in 4 min 15 sec
*   **Female:** Lift & carry 20 kg for 100m in 2 min; Run 1000m in 5 min 40 sec

website_content.title: KMAT Answer Key 2026 Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## KMAT Answer Key 2026 – Download Now!

The KMAT Answer Key 2026 has been released in provisional format for the Session 1 exam held on February 22, 2026. Candidates can download the key to estimate their scores.

**Important Dates:**

*   **Exam Date:** February 22, 2026
*   **Answer Key Release:** February 23, 2026
*   **Objection Window:** Open until notified (check official notice)
*   **Final Answer Key:** After scrutiny of objections (date to be notified)
*   **Result:** Within 2-3 weeks after the exam

**Exam Pattern:**

*   **Total Questions:** 180
*   **Total Marks:** 720
*   **Duration:** 180 minutes
*   **Sections:** English, Quantitative Aptitude, Data Sufficiency & Logical Reasoning, General Knowledge & Current Affairs

**Marking Scheme:** +4 for correct answers, potential negative marking (-1, confirm in official bulletin).

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [cee.kerala.gov.in](cee.kerala.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to “Present Active Links” and click on KMAT 2026.
3.  Click on “Answer Key”.
4.  Download the PDF.

**Objection Process:**

Candidates can challenge the provisional answer key with supporting documentation within the specified timeframe. A fee may apply.

**Key Tips:**

*   Use only the official answer key from CEE, Kerala.
*   Focus on section-wise performance.

website_content.markdown_content:
## CSBC Bihar Police Constable (Operator) Recruitment 2026

The Central Selection Board of Constable (CSBC), Bihar, is recruiting for 993 Constable (Operator) positions in the Bihar Police Radio Organization.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Central Selection Board of Constable (CSBC), Bihar
*   **Post Name:** Constable (Operator) [Sipahi (Prachalak)]
*   **Vacancies:** 993 (Provisional)
*   **Pay Scale:** ₹21,700 - ₹69,100 (Level-3)
*   **Eligibility:** 10+2 (Intermediate) in Science with Physics, Chemistry, Math (50% marks, 45% for SC/ST)
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Selection Process:** Written Exam, Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Document Verification
*   **Job Location:** Bihar

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Release:** February 2026
*   **Online Application Start:** March 1, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** March 31, 2026

**Application Fee:** ₹100 + bank charges

**Age Limit (as of 01.08.2026):**

*   Minimum: 18 years
*   Maximum: 25 years (Unreserved), 27 years (Backward/EBC Males), 28 years (Backward/EBC Females), 30 years (SC/ST/Transgender)

**Physical Standards:**

*   **Height:** Males (UR/BC: 165cm, EBC/ST: 160cm), Females: 155cm
*   **Chest (Males):** UR/BC: 81cm (unexpanded), 86cm (expanded); SC/ST/EBC: 79/81cm (unexpanded), 84/86cm (expanded)
*   **Weight (Females):** Minimum 48 kg

**Written Exam:** 100 marks, 100 questions, 2 hours (Intermediate level syllabus).

**PET:** Running, High Jump, Shot Put (Qualifying).

**Don't forget to check the official notification for detailed information!**

website_content.title: AIBE 20 Rechecking Result 2026 Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## AIBE 20 Rechecking Result 2026 – Key Details

The Bar Council of India has released the AIBE 20 rechecking result for candidates who applied for re-evaluation of their OMR sheets. Candidates can check their status using their registered credentials.

**Exam Name:** All India Bar Examination (AIBE 20 / AIBE XX) – 2025 cycle
**Conducting Body:** Bar Council of India (BCI)
**Exam Date:** 30 November 2025
**Original Result Date:** 7 January 2026
**Rechecking Application Window:** 14 January 2026 – 23 January 2026
**Rechecking Fee:** ₹500 (non-refundable)
**Rechecking Mode:** Online OMR sheet/result rechecking

**Important Dates:**

| Event | Date |
|---|---| 
| AIBE 20 exam date | 30 November 2025 |
| Declaration of AIBE 20 result | 7 January 2026 |
| Opening of OMR rechecking window | 14 January 2026 |
| Last date to apply for rechecking | 23 January 2026 |
| AIBE 20 rechecking result 2026 | Released |

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit the official AIBE website: allindiabarexamination.com.
2.  Click on the “Rechecking Result AIBE-XX” / “AIBE 20 Result Rechecking” link.
3.  Enter your user ID, password, and captcha code.
4.  Login to view your result.

**What is Checked During Rechecking?**

*   Verification of correct OMR scanning.
*   Confirmation of marked answers.
*   Total marks tally with the official answer key.

**Note:** Rechecking does *not* involve re-evaluation or changing marked answers.

**After the Result:**

*   **Pass:** Proceed with the Certificate of Practice (COP) process.
*   **Unchanged:** Original result remains final; no refund of the rechecking fee.

**Official Websites:**

*   [AIBE Official Website](allindiabarexamination.com)

website_content.title: IIT JAM 2026 Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## IIT JAM 2026 Answer Key – Important Updates

The provisional answer key for IIT JAM 2026 has been released by IIT Bombay on February 24, 2026. Candidates can download it from the JOAPS portal at [joaps.iitb.ac.in](joaps.iitb.ac.in).

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** February 24, 2026
*   **Objection Window:** Open until 11:59:59 PM on February 27, 2026
*   **Result Date:** March 20, 2026
*   **Objection Fee:** Typically ₹500 per question (refundable if accepted)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [jam2026.iitb.ac.in](jam2026.iitb.ac.in).
2.  Login to JOAPS using your Enrolment ID/Registered Email ID and Password.
3.  Navigate to the Answer Key/Response Sheet section.
4.  Download the subject-wise answer key PDF.

**Score Calculation:**

*   **Section A (MCQs):** 10 x 1 mark + 20 x 2 marks (-1/3 negative marking for wrong answers)
*   **Section B (MSQs):** No negative marking
*   **Section C (NAT):** No negative marking

**Important Dates:**

*   **Registration Start:** September 05, 2025
*   **Registration Last Date:** October 12, 2025
*   **Admit Card:** January 05, 2026
*   **Exam Date:** February 15, 2026

website_content.title: IAF Agniveervayu Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## IAF Agniveervayu Recruitment 2026

The Indian Air Force (IAF) is seeking applications for Agniveervayu Intake 01/2027 under the Agnipath Scheme.

**Key Details:**

*   **Eligibility:** Unmarried Indian male and female candidates.
*   **Educational Qualification:** 10+2 with 50% marks / Diploma / Vocational Course.
*   **Age Limit:** Born between 01st January 2006 and 01st July 2009 (Max 21 years on enrolment).
*   **Application Fee:** ₹550 + 18% GST (₹649 total).
*   **Online Registration:** 03 March 2026 – 10 March 2026 (11:00 PM).
*   **Exam Date:** 30th March 2026 / 31st March 2026.
*   **Salary:** ₹30,000 - ₹40,000 per month (depending on year of service).
*   **Selection Process:** Online Test (Phase-I), Testing at ASC (Phase-II), Medical Examination (Phase-III).

**Important Dates:**

*   Registration Start: 03 March 2026
*   Registration End: 10 March 2026
*   Exam Date: 30/31 March 2026

For detailed eligibility criteria, medical requirements, and to apply, please visit the official website.

website_content.title: TBSE Class 10 & 12 Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## TBSE Class 10 & 12 Admit Card 2026 - Important Information

The Tripura Board of Secondary Education (TBSE) will release the admit cards for Madhyamik (Class 10) and Higher Secondary (Class 12) board examinations 2026. Here's a breakdown of key details:

**Key Details:**

*   **Board:** Tripura Board of Secondary Education (TBSE)
*   **Exams:** TBSE Madhyamik (Class 10) & Higher Secondary (Class 12) Board Examinations 2026
*   **Release Mode:** Offline - via schools
*   **Classes Covered:** Class 10 & Class 12
*   **Admit Card Status:** Class 10 released through schools; Class 12 to be issued to schools.
*   **Website:** [tbse.tripura.gov.in](tbse.tripura.gov.in)

**How to Obtain:**

*   **Schools:** Download from [tbse.tripura.gov.in](tbse.tripura.gov.in) using school credentials.
*   **Students:** Collect from your respective school.

**Details on Admit Card:**

*   Student Name
*   Roll Number & Registration Number
*   Class & Stream (for Class 12)
*   School Name & Code
*   Exam Centre Details
*   Subject Codes & Exam Dates
*   Candidate Photograph

**Important Guidelines:**

*   Carry original admit card & school ID.
*   Prohibited items: Mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators (unless allowed).
*   Report to the exam centre 30-60 minutes before reporting time.

**In case of errors:** Immediately inform your school.

website_content.markdown_content:
## WBHRB Pharmacist Grade III Final Result 2026 OUT! 

The West Bengal Health Recruitment Board (WBHRB) has released the final result for the Pharmacist Grade III posts on **24 February 2026**. Candidates who appeared in the Computer Based Test (CBT) and subsequent interview can now check their selection status.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** West Bengal Health Recruitment Board
*   **Post Name:** Pharmacist Grade III
*   **Result Type:** Final Result / Panel List
*   **Declaration Date:** 24 February 2026
*   **Selection Stages:** CBT → Interview → Document Verification & Appointment
*   **Total Vacancies:** 350
*   **Panel Validity:** 1 year or until posts are filled.

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: hrb.wb.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the 'Recruitment Results' or 'Notice' section.
3.  Find the link for 'Pharmacist Grade III Final Panel List 2026'.
4.  Download the category-wise PDF (Unreserved/SC/ST/OBC-A/OBC-B/EWS/PWD).
5.  Search for your name/registration number using Ctrl+F.

**Cutoff Ranges (Approximate):**

*   Unreserved: 88.13 – 72.32
*   Scheduled Caste: 72.29 – 61.98
*   OBC-A: 77.97 – 61.19
*   OBC-B: 70.97 – 59.13
*   EWS: 72.25 – 53.03

**Important:** Download the panel list, take a printout, and keep checking the official website for appointment letters and document verification schedules.

website_content.markdown_content:
## UP Police SI/ASI Transcription Admit Card 2026 Released

The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) has released the admit card for the SI (Confidential), ASI (Clerk), and ASI (Accounts) transcription (stenography/shorthand) test for the 2023 recruitment cycle.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 24 February 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 28 February 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 921 Posts
*   **Posts:** SI (Confidential), ASI (Clerk), ASI (Accounts)
*   **Official Website:** uppbpb.gov.in

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official UPPRPB website: uppbpb.gov.in
2.  Navigate to the "Latest News/Notice" or "Admit Card" section.
3.  Click on the link for "UP Police SI ASI Transcription Admit Card 2026".
4.  Enter your Registration Number, Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
5.  Download and print the admit card (2-3 copies recommended).

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Reach the exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Entry closes 30 minutes before the exam.
*   Do not carry mobile phones, smartwatches, or any prohibited items.

website_content.title: PSSSB Group D Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Group D Recruitment 2026

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has announced a recruitment drive for Group D Posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab (SSSB Punjab)
*   **Post Name:** Group-D
*   **Total Vacancies:** Anticipated posts (as per departmental requisitions till 30/09/2026)
*   **Advt No:** 04 of 2026
*   **Salary:** ₹18,000 - ₹56,900 (Level-1 as per 7th CPC)
*   **Educational Qualification:** Matriculation with Punjabi language
*   **Age Limit:** 18-37 years (as on 01/01/2026) - Relaxation as per rules
*   **Application Start Date:** 27/02/2026
*   **Application End Date:** 20/03/2026
*   **Application Mode:** Online

**Application Fee:**

*   General/Sports/Freedom Fighter: ₹1000
*   SC/BC/EWS: ₹250
*   ESM & Dependents: ₹200
*   Physical Handicapped: ₹500

**Selection Process:**

1.  Written Examination (Punjabi Qualifying & Merit-based)
2.  Document Verification
3.  Merit List (based on Part-B marks)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Only online applications are accepted.
*   Punjabi language qualification at Matric level is mandatory.
*   Age and qualifications are considered as of 01/01/2026.
*   Negative marking of 1/4 marks for incorrect answers.

website_content.title: Excise and Taxation Inspector - PSSSB
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Excise and Taxation Inspector Recruitment 2026

**Overview:**

*   **Organization:** Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab
*   **Post Name:** Excise and Taxation Inspector
*   **Total Vacancies:** 197
*   **Advertisement No:** 01/2026
*   **Salary:** Rs. 35,400/- (7th CPC)
*   **Job Type:** Full Time

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Qualification:** Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university + 120 hours IT/Computer course from an ISO 9001 certified institution OR O level DOEACC equivalent. Punjabi at matriculation level with 50% marks is mandatory.
*   **Age Limit:**
    *   General: 18-37 years
    *   SC/BC Residents: 18-42 years
    *   Age relaxation available for various categories (see full details in notification).

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Date:** 06 February 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 13 February 2026
*   **Application Last Date:** 06 March 2026

**Application Fee:**

*   General/Freedom Fighter/Sportsman: Rs. 1,000/- 
*   SC/BC/EWS: Rs. 250/- 
*   Ex-Servicemen: Rs. 200/- 
*   Physically Handicapped: Rs. 500/- 

**Selection Process:**

*   Written Examination (Objective type - Multiple Choice Questions) - Part A (Punjabi - qualifying), Part B (based on educational qualification).
*   Document Verification and Counseling

**Apply Mode:** Online

## TNPSC CTS Hall Ticket 2026 - Download Now!

The Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has released the hall ticket for the Combined Technical Services Examination (Interview Posts) – 2026.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 25 February 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 7 & 8 March 2026 (Forenoon & Afternoon sessions)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 76 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** 19/2025
*   **Exam Mode:** Computer Based Test (CBT)

**Download Link:** [Direct Download Link - Available on website]

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: tnpsc.gov.in or apply.tnpscexams.in
2.  Navigate to the "Hall Ticket Download" or "Important Links" section.
3.  Enter your Application Number / Registration Number / OTR ID and Date of Birth.
4.  Download and print the hall ticket (2-3 copies recommended).

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   TNPSC CTS Hall Ticket 2026 (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Check all details on the hall ticket immediately after download.
*   Report any discrepancies to TNPSC helpdesk within 24 hours.
*   Reach the exam center 60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Entry closes 30 minutes before the exam starts.

## Nagaon University Result 2026 (FYUGP 3rd Semester Arrear–Betterment)

Nagaon University has released the FYUGP 3rd Semester End-Term Examinations December 2025 result for Arrear–Betterment candidates of Batch 2023. Students can download the result PDF from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Programme:** FYUGP – Four-Year Undergraduate Programme
*   **Semester:** 3rd Semester End-Term Examinations
*   **Exam Session:** December 2025
*   **Result Category:** Arrear–Betterment, Batch 2023
*   **Result Year:** 2026
*   **Result Mode:** Online PDF (downloadable)

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official Nagaon University website.
2.  Navigate to the “Examinations”, “Results” or “News/Notifications” section.
3.  Find the link for “Result, FYUGP 3rd Semester End-Term Examinations, December 2025 (Arrear–Betterment, Batch 2023)”.
4.  Click the link and download the PDF.
5.  Search for your roll number and check your marks, SGPA/CGPA, and result status.

**Important Points:**

*   This result is for Batch 2023 arrear/betterment candidates only.

*   'Withheld' or 'Expelled' require contacting the university/college.

**Who Can Check:**

*   Students of Batch 2023 who appeared for the FYUGP 3rd Semester exams as arrear/betterment candidates.
*   Candidates whose results are not withheld.

website_content.markdown_content:
## RRB Technician Grade 1 & Grade 3 City Intimation Slip 2026 Released! 

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the City Intimation Slip for the Technician Grade 1 (Signal) & Grade 3 Examination (CEN 02/2025). 

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 26 February 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** 6, 9, 10 & 13 March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 6,238 Posts
*   **Exam Mode:** Computer Based Test (CBT)
*   **Admit Card Release:** 4 days before exam date

**What is the City Intimation Slip?**

The City Intimation Slip provides preliminary information about your exam city, date, and shift. *It is NOT your admit card.*

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit your respective Regional RRB website (rrbcdg.gov.in or any of the 21 regional portals).
2.  Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth/Password.
3.  Enter the Captcha Code.
4.  Download and save your City Intimation Slip.

website_content.title: HPBOSE Class 12th Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## HPBOSE Class 12th Admit Card 2026 – Latest Update

The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education has released the HPBOSE Class 12th Admit Card 2026 for schools to download via the official portal [hpbose.org](http://hpbose.org).

**Key Dates:**

| Event | Date |
|---|---| 
| Release of HPBOSE Class 12th Date Sheet 2026 | 26 November 2025 |
| Practical Exams | 2 February 2026 – 28 February 2026 |
| Admit Card Release (School Login) | February 2026 |
| Theory Exams | 3 March 2026 – 1 April 2026 |
| Expected Result | May 2026 (Tentative) |

**How to Download (For Schools):**

1.  Visit [hpbose.org](http://hpbose.org).
2.  Click on “Online Services” then “School Login”.
3.  Enter school credentials.
4.  Navigate to the Class 12 admit card section.
5.  Download the PDF, print, sign, and stamp before distributing to students.

**Important Notes:**

*   Students cannot download directly; only schools have access.
*   Verify all details on the admit card (name, photo, subject, dates).
*   Carry the *original* admit card to the exam.
*   Prohibited items: mobile phones, smartwatches, etc.
*   Report to the exam center 30 minutes before the reporting time.

website_content.markdown_content:
## UP DElEd 1st & 3rd Semester Result 2026 Announced!

The Examination Regulatory Authority, Prayagraj (PNP) has officially declared the UP DElEd 1st and 3rd Semester Results for 2026.

**Key Dates:**

*   **1st Semester Exam:** October 27–29, 2025
*   **3rd Semester Exam:** October 30–November 1, 2025
*   **Result Uploaded:** February 2026 (Declared February 25-26, 2026)

**About UP DElEd:**

UP DElEd (Diploma in Elementary Education) is a two-year diploma program for aspiring primary teachers in Uttar Pradesh.

**Pass Percentage:**

Approximately 50-58% pass rate across sessions (around 242,306 passes out of 419,095 candidates).

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit the official portal: [btcresult.in](btcresult.in) (also check [updeled.gov.in](updeled.gov.in), [updeledinfo.in](updeledinfo.in) or [updeledexam.in](updeledexam.in))
2.  Find the “D.El.Ed Result” section.
3.  Select your semester and year.
4.  Enter your roll number and other required details.
5.  Download and print your marksheet.

**What Next?**

*   **Passed:** Verify marksheet, prepare for next semester.
*   **Failed/Low Marks:** Check for revaluation/compartment options.

## RRB Nursing Superintendent Admit Card 2026 OUT Soon!

Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) will release the admit card for the Nursing Superintendent CBT exam on **March 7, 2026** (4 days before the exam). Candidates who applied under CEN 03/2025 can download their hall ticket from the official RRB website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** March 7, 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** March 11, 12 & 13, 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 272 (Nursing Superintendent)
*   **Advertisement No.:** CEN 03/2025
*   **Exam Mode:** Online (CBT)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official RRB website or your regional RRB portal.
2.  Navigate to the "CEN 03/2025" or "Admit Card" section.
3.  Enter your Registration Number/Username, Date of Birth/Password, and Captcha Code.
4.  Download and save the PDF file.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)

**What to avoid:**

*   Mobile phones and electronic devices
*   Smartwatches
*   Calculators
*   Books, notes, or study materials
*   Bags

website_content.title: UGC NET December 2025 Final Answer Key Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## UGC NET December 2025 Final Answer Key Released!

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the UGC NET Final Answer Key 2026 for the December 2025 session. Candidates can now download the subject-wise final answer key PDFs.

**Key Highlights:**

| Detail | Information |
|---|---| 
| Exam Name | UGC NET December 2025 Session |
| Conducting Authority | National Testing Agency (NTA) |
| Exam Purpose | Eligibility for Assistant Professor & JRF in India |
| Exam Mode | Computer-Based Test (CBT) |
| Papers | Paper 1 (General) & Paper 2 (Subject-specific) |
| Final Answer Key Status | Released for UGC NET Dec 2025 session |
| Official Website | ugcnet.nta.ac.in |

**How to Download:**

1. Visit the official website: ugcnet.nta.ac.in
2. Look for the latest notification section related to “UGC NET December 2025 Final Answer Key”.
3. Click on the link titled “Final Answer Keys for UGC NET Dec 2025.”
4. Download the final answer key PDF for your subject (Paper 2).

**Important Dates:**

| Event | Details/Status |
|---|---| 
| UGC NET December 2025 Exam | Conducted in CBT mode |
| Provisional Answer Key Release | Released before challenge window |
| Answer Key Objection Window | Open for a limited period |
| Final Answer Key Release | Published after expert review |
| Result & Scorecard | Declared based on final answer key

**Calculating Your Score:**

*   Download the final answer key and your response sheet (if available).
*   Compare your answers with the final key.
*   Count correct answers for Paper 1 & Paper 2.
*   Multiply correct answers by marks per question.
*   Add paper scores to estimate your total score.

website_content.title: TN SSLC Hall Ticket 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## TN SSLC Hall Ticket 2026 Released!

The Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu has released the hall tickets for the Class 10 public exams. Students can download their admit cards from the official website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Name:** Tamil Nadu SSLC (10th Class) Exam 2026
*   **Conducting Body:** Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu
*   **Release Date:** March 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** March - April 2026
*   **Mode of Release:** Online

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website.
2.  Click on “SSLC Hall Ticket 2026”.
3.  Select your school type and enter your registration number and date of birth.
4.  Click “Submit”.
5.  Download and print the hall ticket.

**Details on Hall Ticket:**

*   Student’s name and roll number
*   Date of birth
*   School name and code
*   Subject names and codes
*   Exam center name and address
*   Exam dates and timings

**Exam Schedule (Tentative):**

*   Language: 16th March 2026
*   English: 20th March 2026
*   Mathematics: 23rd March 2026
*   Science (Physical Science): 25th March 2026
*   Science (Biological Science): 28th March 2026
*   Social Science: 30th March 2026
*   Vocational Course: 1st April 2026

**Important Instructions:**

*   Carry a printed copy of your hall ticket.
*   Report to the exam hall 30 minutes before the start time.
*   Avoid mobile phones, smart watches, or calculators.

website_content.title: CEED 2026 Result Released
website_content.markdown_content:
## CEED 2026 Result Announced!

The Common Entrance Examination for Design (CEED) 2026 Result has been released on **March 4, 2026**. Candidates can download their scorecards from **March 10, 2026, to July 31, 2026**.

**Key Dates:**

*   **Exam Date:** January 18, 2026
*   **Draft Answer Key Release:** January 20, 2026
*   **Final Answer Key Release:** January 28, 2026
*   **Result Date:** March 4, 2026
*   **Scorecard Download:** March 10, 2026 – July 31, 2026

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit [ceed.iitb.ac.in](ceed.iitb.ac.in).
2.  Click on the “Result/Scorecard” link.
3.  Log in with your registered email ID and password.

**Score Calculation:**

*   Part A: 25% weightage
*   Part B: 75% weightage

**What's Next?**

Apply to participating institutes for M.Des and PhD admissions. Prepare a portfolio and be ready for further rounds like interviews and studio tests.

**Important Note:** Re-evaluation of Part B is generally not permitted. Contact the CEED office for any discrepancies.

The Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has released the hall ticket for the Group 2A (Mains) examination. Qualified candidates from the prelims can download their admit cards.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date (Group 2A):** 11 February 2026
*   **Release Date (Group 2AA):** 02 March 2026
*   **Exam Date (Group 2A):** 22 February 2026 (FN)
*   **Exam Date (Group 2AA):** 15 March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 645 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** 11/2025
*   **Official Website:** [tnpsc.gov.in](https://tnpsc.gov.in)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: tnpsc.gov.in or apply.tnpscexams.in

*   Try a different browser.
*   Verify application status.
*   Contact TNPSC helpdesk.

## UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026

**District Programme Officer, UP** has announced a recruitment drive for **172 Anganwadi Worker** posts.

**Key Details:**

*   **Total Vacancies:** 172
*   **Qualification:** Intermediate or Equivalent
*   **Age Limit:** 18-35 years (as of 01 July 2025)
*   **Start Date:** 07 February 2026
*   **Last Date:** 09 March 2026 (up to 12:00 midnight)
*   **Gender:** Only Female Candidates are eligible.

**Vacancy Breakdown (Selected Districts):**

*   Rajgarh (Rural): 23
*   Jamalpur (Rural): 06
*   Narayanpur (Rural/Urban): 12
*   Sikhar (Rural): 10
*   Majhwan (Rural): 05
*   Mahidan (Rural): 08
*   Padadi (Rural): 10

For detailed information, including project-wise vacancies and reservation details, please refer to the official website.

website_content.markdown_content:
## AP SSC Hall Ticket 2026 Released!

The Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh (BSEAP) has released the AP SSC Hall Ticket 2026 on **March 2nd, 2026**. Students appearing for the SSC Public Examinations (Class 10) can download their hall tickets from the official BSEAP website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Board:** Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh (BSEAP)
*   **Exam Name:** SSC Public Examinations
*   **Class:** Class 10
*   **Release Date:** March 2nd, 2026
*   **Website:** bse.ap.gov.in

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official website: bse.ap.gov.in.
2.  Find the AP SSC Hall Ticket 2026 link.
3.  Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth.
4.  Click Submit and download your hall ticket.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Verify all details on the hall ticket.
*   Carry a valid photo ID.
*   Report to the exam center 30 minutes early.
*   Electronic devices are prohibited.
*   Keep multiple printouts.

website_content.title: PSTET Admit Card 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSTET Admit Card 2026: Download Now!

The PSTET Admit Card 2026 is essential for appearing in the Punjab State Teacher Eligibility Test. It will be released online only, and candidates must download it from the official PSTET website.

**Key Dates:**

*   **Online Registration:** 06 February 2026 – 20 February 2026
*   **Application Correction Window:** 21 February 2026 – 23 February 2026
*   **Admit Card Download:** 09 March 2026 – 15 March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 15 March 2026 (Sunday)
*   **Answer Key Upload:** 16 March 2026

**Important Details on the Admit Card:**

*   Candidate’s Name
*   Roll Number / Application Number
*   Photograph & Signature
*   Paper Name (Paper 1 / Paper 2)
*   Exam Date & Shift Timing
*   Reporting Time & Gate Closing Time
*   Exam Centre Address
*   Category & Other Details
*   Exam Day Instructions

**Instructions:**

*   Carry a printout of the admit card and a valid photo ID.
*   Reach the exam centre 60-90 minutes before reporting time.
*   Do not carry electronic devices like mobile phones or smartwatches.

**Always verify the details on your admit card against your application form. Contact the exam authority immediately for any discrepancies.**

website_content.title: HPRCA JBT Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## HPRCA JBT Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) has released the answer key for the Junior Basic Teacher (JBT) examination held from February 25th to 27th, 2026. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA)
*   **Post Name:** JBT (Junior Basic Teacher)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 600
*   **Exam Date:** February 25th - 27th, 2026
*   **Answer Key Released:** March 2nd, 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** March 8th, 2026 (11:55 PM)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit [hprca.hp.gov.in](hprca.hp.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to the "Recruitment for the post of Junior Basic Teacher" or "Answer Key/Notices" section.
3.  Click on "HPRCA JBT Answer Key 2026" or the login link.
4.  Login with your Application Number and User Password.

**How to Raise Objections:**

1.  Login to your candidate portal on [hprca.hp.gov.in](hprca.hp.gov.in).
2.  Go to the "Objection" or "Challenge/Objection" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge and upload supporting documents.
4.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
5.  Submit before March 8th, 2026 (11:55 PM).

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: February 25th - 27th, 2026
*   Answer Key Released: March 2nd, 2026
*   Objection Deadline: March 8th, 2026
*   Final Answer Key (Expected): March/April 2026
*   Result Declaration (Expected): April 2026 onwards

website_content.title: Amravati Rural Police Constable Result 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Amravati Rural Police Constable Result 2026 OUT! 

**Quick Summary:**

The Amravati Rural Police has released the provisional lists of eligible candidates (1:10 ratio) for the Police Constable (Shipai) written examination on **05-03-2026**. These category-wise temporary lists (EWS, SEBC, OBC, SBC, etc.) qualify candidates for the next stage – the written exam.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Amravati Rural Police Department
*   **Post Name:** Police Constable (Shipai)
*   **Result Type:** Provisional Eligibility List (1:10 Ratio) for Written Exam
*   **Release Date:** 05-03-2026
*   **Previous Stage:** Physical / Field Test (February 2026)
*   **Selection Stages:** Physical Measurement & Efficiency Test → Provisional List → Written Exam → Document Verification → Final Merit
*   **Official Website:** amravatiruralpolice.gov.in

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit the official website: amravatiruralpolice.gov.in/recruitment
2.  Scroll to the latest notices section dated 05-03-2026.
3.  Click on the relevant category link (e.g., EWS Category, OBC Category, etc.) for the "1:10 Provisional List for Written Exam".
4.  Open the PDF and search for your name, application number, or other details.
5.  Download and save the list for reference.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the relevant category list PDF immediately.
*   Prepare for the written examination – check the official site for admit card and syllabus updates.
*   Lists are provisional – subject to document checks and corrections.
*   Check the official website regularly for written exam date, admit card, and final merit updates.

website_content.title: Central Bank of India Specialist Officer (SO) Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## Central Bank of India SO 2026 – Overview

The Central Bank of India is recruiting Specialist Officers (SO) for various specialized roles including IT, Risk Management, Marketing, and Forex.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organisation:** Central Bank of India
*   **Post:** Specialist Officer (SO)
*   **Mode of Exam:** Online
*   **Question Type:** Objective (MCQ)
*   **Total Questions:** 100
*   **Total Marks:** 100
*   **Duration:** 60 Minutes
*   **Negative Marking:** No
*   **Selection Process:** Online Exam + Interview

**Exam Pattern:**

| Section                                       | No. of Questions | Marks | Duration        |
| :-------------------------------------------- | :--------------- | :---- | :-------------- |
| Stream/Category Specific (Professional Knowledge) | 70               | 70    | 60 Minutes      |
| Banking, Economy & General Awareness          | 30               | 30    | 60 Minutes      |
| **Total**                                     | **100**          | **100** | **60 Minutes** |

**Selection Process:**

1.  Online Examination (Qualifying)
2.  Interview (Weightage: 70:30 Exam:Interview)

**Syllabus Highlights:**

*   **Professional Knowledge:** Stream-specific (70 marks)
*   **Banking & Economy:** RBI policies, current affairs (30 marks)

**Important Topics:**

*   Professional Knowledge (Stream-specific)
*   RBI Policies & Banking Terminology
*   Current Affairs (Last 6 months - Economy & Finance)

**Preparation Strategy:**

*   Focus 60-70% time on Professional Knowledge.
*   Revise banking/economic current affairs daily.
*   Practice full mocks under time constraints.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) Apprentice Notification 2026

**Overview:**

*   **Company:** Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL)
*   **Post Name:** Technician Apprentice / Trade Apprentice / Graduate Apprentice
*   **Total Vacancies:** 144
*   **Advt No:** IOCL/MKTG/ER/APPR/2025-26/1
*   **Salary:** As per Apprentices Act, 1961/1973/1992
*   **Application Fee:** NIL
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 09-03-2026
*   **Job Type:** Apprenticeship

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Age Limit:** 18-24 years (as on 28.02.2026). Relaxation for SC/ST (up to 29 years), OBC-NCL (up to 27 years), PwBD (up to 34 years/39 years for SC/ST PwBD).
*   **Qualification:**
    *   Technician Apprentices: 3 years Diploma in relevant Engineering discipline with 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwBD).
    *   Trade Apprentices (ITI): Matric with 2 years ITI in the respective trade recognized by NCVT/SCVT.
    *   Graduate Apprentices: Regular full-time Graduate degree with 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwBD).
    *   Data Entry Operator: Class 12th with 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwBD).

**Vacancy Details (State-wise):**

*   West Bengal: 73
*   Bihar: 19
*   Odisha: 14
*   Jharkhand: 10
*   Sikkim: 03
*   Nagaland: 05
*   Manipur: 05
*   Arunachal Pradesh: 02
*   Andaman & Nicobar Island: 08

**Important Dates:**

*   Online Application Starts: 02-03-2026
*   Last Date to Apply: 09-03-2026

**Selection Process:**

*   Online registration on NAPS/NATS portal.
*   Microsoft Form submission for location preference.
*   Merit list based on qualification marks.
*   Document verification & Medical Fitness Test.

* Fitter: 85
* Machinist: 31

* CNC Programming cum-Operator: 23
* Electrician: 18

**Apply via:** Registered Post or Drop Box at Rail Wheel Factory, Yelahanka, Bengaluru.

website_content.title: PSSSB Clerk IT & Hostel Superintendent Answer Key 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## PSSSB Clerk IT & Hostel Superintendent Answer Key 2026 Released!

The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the provisional answer key for the Clerk IT and Hostel Superintendent cum PTI examination held on **February 28, 2026**. 

**Key Details:**
*   **Organization:** Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB)
*   **Posts:** Clerk IT (03 vacancies), Hostel Superintendent cum PTI (68 vacancies)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 71 (Advt No. 11/2025 & 13/2025)
*   **Answer Key Released On:** March 01, 2026
*   **Objection Deadline:** Check official notice on sssb.punjab.gov.in

**How to Download:**
1.  Visit [sssb.punjab.gov.in](sssb.punjab.gov.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Results" or "Latest News/Updates" section.
3.  Click on the relevant "Provisional Answer Key" link.
4.  Login with Roll Number/Registration Number and Date of Birth to view your OMR/response sheet.

**How to Raise Objections:**
1.  Login to your candidate portal on sssb.punjab.gov.in.
2.  Go to the "Objection" / "Challenge" section.
3.  Select the question(s) to challenge and upload supporting documents (if required).
4.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).

**Important Dates:**
*   Exam Date: February 28, 2026
*   Answer Key Release Date: March 01, 2026
*   Objection Deadline: As per official notice

**Marking Scheme:**
*   Correct Answer: +1 mark
*   Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark (negative marking)
*   Unattempted: 0 marks

website_content.markdown_content:
## FSSAI Food Analyst Admit Card 2026 - Download Now!

The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has released the admit card for the 11th Food Analyst Examination (FAE) 2025 (2026 cycle). Candidates who applied for Food Analyst certification can download their hall ticket.

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 24 February 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 8 March 2026
*   **Exam Type:** 11th Food Analyst Examination (CBT)
*   **Official Website:** fssai.gov.in / fssai.formsubmit.in

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit fssai.formsubmit.in/ep_ses_web_landing
2.  Navigate to the admit card section.
3.  Enter your User ID/Registration Number, Password/Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
4.  Download and save the PDF.
5.  Print 2-3 copies.

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Blue/Black ballpoint pen

**Pro Tip:** Check all details on your admit card immediately after download and report any discrepancies to faexam.qa@fssai.gov.in within 24 hours.

website_content.markdown_content:
## CUET PG Admit Card 2026 - Important Updates

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the exam city intimation slip for CUET PG 2026 exams scheduled from March 6-10, 2026. The admit card is expected to be released shortly on the official NTA CUET PG website.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Dates:** March 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 16, 17, 18, 19, 24, 25, and 27, 2026
*   **Mode:** Computer Based Test (CBT)
*   **Number of Shifts:** 44 shifts of 90 minutes each
*   **Website:** exams.nta.nic.in (CUET PG section) or nta.ac.in

**Login Credentials:**

*   Application Number
*   Password or Date of Birth
*   Security Pin

**Documents Required:**

*   Printed Admit Card (A4 size, preferably colour)
*   Original Photo ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, Driving License, Voter ID)
*   Passport-size photograph (same as application form)
*   PwD certificate (if applicable)

**Important Reminders:**

*   Check the website regularly for admit card updates.
*   Verify all details on the admit card carefully.
*   Reach the exam centre 60-90 minutes before reporting time.
*   Do not carry prohibited items like electronic gadgets or study material.

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** KVS & NVS (Conducted by CBSE)
*   **Posts:** PRT, TGT, PGT & Non-Teaching
*   **Result Type:** Tier-1 Examination Result & Scorecard
*   **Declaration Date:** February 28, 2026
*   **Exam Date:** January 10th & 11th, 2026
*   **Selection Stages:** Tier-1 → Tier-2 → Interview / Skill Test / Document Verification

**How to Check Your Result:**

1.  Visit kvsangathan.nic.in, navodaya.gov.in, or cbse.gov.in.
2.  Navigate to the “Recruitment / Results” section.

*   Qualifying Status

Don't forget to check for Tier-2 exam updates and prepare accordingly!

website_content.markdown_content:
## CBSE Group A, B, C Result 2026 OUT! 

The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has released the Tier-1 result for Group A, B, C Non-Teaching Posts (DRQ2026) on **March 02, 2026**. A total of **124** vacancies were available.

**Key Details:**

*   **Result Type:** Tier-1 Written Examination Result (DRQ2026)
*   **Exam Date:** January 31 & February 01, 2026
*   **Total Posts:** 124
*   **Selection Process:** Tier-1 → Tier-2 → Document Verification → Medical Examination

**How to Check Result:**

1.  Visit [cbse.gov.in](cbse.gov.in) or [cbseit.in](cbseit.in).
2.  Navigate to the "Recruitment" or "Public Notices" section.
3.  Find the "Result Notice DRQ2026 Tier-1" link.
4.  Enter your Roll Number/Registration Number and Date of Birth.
5.  Download your result, scorecard, and merit status.

**Merit List Information:**

The merit list includes Roll Number, Candidate Name, Category, Marks Obtained, Merit Position, and Qualifying Status. Cutoff marks are also available in the official notice.

**Scorecard Details:**

The scorecard displays Candidate Name, Roll Number, Exam Date, Marks Obtained, Cutoff Marks, Qualifying Status, and Category Rank.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Karnataka SSLC Hall Ticket 2026

**Overview:**

| Particulars | Details |
|---|---| 
| Exam Name | Karnataka SSLC Examination 2026 |
| Conducting Body | Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) |
| Hall Ticket Release Date | March 2026 |
| Mode of Availability | Online (School Login) |
| Official Website | kseeb.karnataka.gov.in |
| Exam Dates | March - April 2026 (Expected) |
| Login Credentials | School Code, User ID, and Password |

**How to Download:**

1. Go to the KSEAB SSLC portal: kseeb.karnataka.gov.in
2. Click on the “SSLC Hall Ticket 2026” link.
3. Enter the School Code, User ID, and Password.
4. Click “Login” and generate hall tickets.
5. Download and print the admit card.

**Important Note:** Students must collect their printed admit cards from school authorities after authentication.

**Details on Admit Card:**

*   Student’s Name and Roll Number
*   Photograph and Signature
*   School Name and Code
*   Exam Center Name and Code
*   Subject-wise Exam Dates and Timings
*   Important Instructions
*   Signature of the School Head and Board Seal

**Important Dates:**

| Event | Date (Expected) |
|---|---| 
| Hall Ticket Release Date | March 2026 |
| SSLC Exam Dates | March–April 2026 |
| Result Declaration | May 2026 (Tentative) |
| Supplementary Exam | June–July 2026 |

**Instructions:**

*   Verify name and subject spelling.
*   Keep multiple copies.
*   Read all exam instructions.
*   Locate your exam center in advance.
*   Do not write on the admit card.

website_content.title: WBSSC Group C Clerk Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## WBSSC Group C Answer Key 2026

The West Bengal School Service Commission (WBSSC) conducted the Group C (Clerk) examination on 1 March 2026. Unofficial answer keys are available from platforms like Adda247 and Career Power. The official provisional answer key is expected in the 2nd week of March 2026.

**Key Details:**

*   **Organization:** West Bengal School Service Commission (WBSSC)
*   **Post Name:** Group C (Clerk)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 2989 (approximately, some sources mention 723 for specific categories)
*   **Exam Date:** 1 March 2026
*   **Answer Key Status:** Unofficial Released
*   **Official Key Release (Expected):** 2nd week of March 2026
*   **Objection Period:** To be announced with the provisional key
*   **Exam Structure:** 60 questions for 60 marks
*   **Marking Scheme:** +1 for correct answer, 0 for incorrect/unattempted answers (no negative marking)

**Important Dates:**

*   Exam Conducted: 1 March 2026
*   Unofficial Answer Key Released: 1 March 2026
*   Provisional Answer Key (Official Expected): 2nd week of March 2026
*   Last Date to Raise Objection: To be announced
*   Final Answer Key (Expected): After objections (March 2026)
*   Result Declaration (Expected): Last week of March 2026 or soon after

**How to Download (Official Key - once released):**

1.  Visit [www.westbengalssc.com](www.westbengalssc.com)
2.  Navigate to the “Answer Keys” or “Latest Notifications” section.
3.  Click on the relevant link.
4.  Log in with your credentials (if required).
5.  Download the PDF.

**How to Raise Objections (against provisional key):**

1.  Log in to your candidate portal on [www.westbengalssc.com](www.westbengalssc.com).
2.  Go to the “Objection/Challenge” section.
3.  Select the question(s) and upload supporting documents (if needed).
4.  Pay the objection fee (if applicable).
5.  Submit before the deadline.

website_content.title: VMC Assistant Engineer & Work Assistant Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## VMC Assistant Engineer & Work Assistant Recruitment 2026

The Vadodara Municipal Corporation (VMC) is recruiting for **200 Assistant Engineer and Work Assistant posts**.

**Key Details:**

*   **Company:** Vadodara Municipal Corporation (VMC)
*   **Posts:** Assistant Engineer (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Elec-Mech), Work Assistant (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 200
*   **Salary:** ₹20,000 - ₹39,200 per month
*   **Eligibility:** B.Tech/B.E or Diploma (depending on the post - see details below)
*   **Age Limit:** Not more than 45 years
*   **Application Deadline:** 09-03-2026
*   **Online Application Start Date:** 28-02-2026

**Vacancy Breakdown:**

| Post Name                 | No. of Posts | Monthly Salary |
| ------------------------- | ------------ | -------------- |
| Assistant Engineer (Civil) | 30           | ₹39,200/-      |
| Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) | 10           | ₹39,200/-      |
| Assistant Engineer (Electrical) | 5            | ₹39,200/-      |
| Assistant Engineer (Elec-Mech) | 5            | ₹39,200/-      |
| Work Assistant (Civil)    | 100          | ₹20,000/-      |
| Work Assistant (Mechanical) | 30           | ₹20,000/-      |
| Work Assistant (Electrical) | 20           | ₹20,000/-      |

**Eligibility Details:**

*   **Assistant Engineer (Civil):** B.E./B.Tech. (Civil)
*   **Assistant Engineer (Mechanical):** B.E./B.Tech. (Mechanical)
*   **Assistant Engineer (Electrical):** B.E./B.Tech. (Electrical)
*   **Assistant Engineer (Elec-Mech):** B.E./B.Tech. (Elec-Mech) OR B.E./B.Tech. (Elec) OR B.E./B.Tech. (Mech)

## CG Vyapam Lab Assistant Admit Card 2026

The Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board (CG Vyapam) will release the admit card for the Lab Assistant recruitment (Advertisement PLII25) on **16 March 2026** (Expected). Candidates can download their hall ticket from [vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in](https://vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in) or [vyapamprofile.cgstate.gov.in/online](https://vyapamprofile.cgstate.gov.in/online).

The written examination is tentatively scheduled for **22 March 2026**.

**Quick Information:**

*   **Release Date:** 16 March 2026 (Expected)
*   **Exam Date:** 22 March 2026 (Tentative)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 13 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** PLII25

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Start Date: 02 January 2026 (Completed)
*   Application Last Date: 27 January 2026 (Completed)
*   Admit Card Release Date: 16 March 2026 (Expected Soon)
*   Exam Date: 22 March 2026 (Upcoming)

**Documents Required:**

*   Admit Card
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Blue/Black Pen

**Prohibited Items:** Mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, books, notes, bags, Bluetooth devices.

**If you face issues downloading the admit card:** Clear browser cache, try a different browser, verify application status, or contact CG Vyapam helpdesk.

website_content.markdown_content:
## BRAOU 1st & 3rd Semester Hall Ticket 2026 – Details

Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Open University (BRAOU), Hyderabad, has released the hall tickets for the UG (CBCS) 1st and 3rd semester examinations scheduled for 2026.

**Key Details:**

*   **Exam Authority:** Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Open University (BRAOU)
*   **Courses:** UG (CBCS) – BA, BCom, BSc and other programmes
*   **Semesters:** 1st & 3rd Semester
*   **Hall Ticket Mode:** Online only
*   **Login Credentials:** Admission Number (last digits) + Semester
*   **Required Documents:** Printed hall ticket + valid photo ID

**Important Dates & Timings:**

| Date of Exam | Course Details                                       | Duration      | Timings       |
|--------------|------------------------------------------------------|---------------|---------------|
| 24-02-2026   | ICTs for Education [UG 305 SEC-1]                  | 1½ Hours      | 2.00 to 3.30 pm |
| 25-02-2026   | Personality Development and Soft Skills [UG 305 SEC-2] | 1½ Hours      | 2.00 to 3.30 pm |
| 26-02-2026   | English – A Foundation Course - III                 | 2 Hours       | 2.00 to 4.00 pm |
| 27-02-2026   | Modern Indian Language (MIL)                         | 2 Hours       | 2.00 to 4.00 pm |
| 28-02-2026   | Optional Subject - I - DSC                           | 3 Hours       | 2.00 to 5.00 pm |
| 01-03-2026   | Optional Subject - II - DSC                          | 3 Hours       | 2.00 to 5.00 pm |
| 02-03-2026   | Optional Subject - III - DSC                         | 3 Hours       | 2.00 to 5.00 pm |

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official BRAOU portal.
2.  Navigate to the “Hall-Tickets Download” section.
3.  Enter your Admission Number and Semester.
4.  Download and print the hall ticket.

**Important Instructions:**

*   Carry a printed hall ticket and a valid photo ID.
*   Reach the exam center 30-60 minutes before the reporting time.
*   Do not carry electronic gadgets or prohibited materials.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Maharashtra Police Bharti Physical Test Hall Ticket 2026 OUT!

Candidates who applied for Maharashtra Police Constable (Police Shipai) Recruitment 2025 can now download their physical test admit card. The physical efficiency/ground test is upcoming across various districts in Maharashtra.

**Quick Information:**

*   **Release Date:** February 2026
*   **Download Status:** Active Now
*   **Recruitment Year:** 2024-25 / 2025
*   **Posts:** Police Constable, Driver, SRPF, Bandsman, Jail Constable
*   **Total Vacancies:** 17,000+ Posts (Approx.)
*   **Test Mode:** Offline (Ground/Field Test)

**Important Dates:**

*   Application Last Date: 07 December 2025 (Completed)
*   Physical Hall Ticket Release: February 2026 (Live Now)
*   Written Exam / Result: To be announced

**Hall Ticket Details:**

Your hall ticket will contain your name, photo, application/roll number, date of birth, category, gender, test date & time, venue details, and instructions for the physical test.

**Documents Required:**

*   Printed Physical Test Hall Ticket 2026 (color print)
*   Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, etc.)
*   Recent passport-size photographs (2-3 copies)

**What to Bring:** Sports attire, water bottle, light snacks.
**What NOT to Bring:** Mobile phones, electronic gadgets, valuables, study material.

**Having trouble downloading?**

*   Clear browser cache or use incognito mode.
*   Try a different browser.
*   Check your application status.
*   Contact the Maharashtra Police helpline.

website_content.markdown_content:
## Ordnance Factory Itarsi (Munitions India Limited) - CPW Recruitment 2026

**Overview:**

*   **Company:** Ordnance Factory Itarsi (under Munitions India Limited)
*   **Post:** Tenure Based CPW (Chemical Process Worker)
*   **Total Vacancies:** 265
*   **Salary:** Rs. 19900 + DA
*   **Job Type:** Contract

**Eligibility:**

*   **Age Limit:** 18 - 40 years (Relaxation for SC/ST: 5 years, OBC (NCL): 3 years, Ex-Servicemen: Military service period + 3 years)

*   **Application Fee:** Nil for all categories

**Important Dates:**

*   **Notification Released:** 05 March 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 25 March 2026

**Selection Process:**

*   NAC Marks (80% weightage)
*   Trade Test / Practical Test (20% weightage)
*   Document Verification

**Application Mode:** Offline

**How to Apply:**

1.  Download the application form from the official website.
2.  Fill the form carefully.
3.  Attach self-attested documents.
4.  Send the completed form via Speed Post/Registered Post to the address mentioned in the notification.

*   **Provisional Marks Published:** 04.03.2026

**How to Check & Submit Objections:**

*   Download and save your marks statement and objection confirmation.
*   Keep checking the official website for updates.

website_content.markdown_content:
## LNMU UG 1st Semester Admit Card 2026 – Download Now!

The Lalit Narayan Mithila University (LNMU), Darbhanga has released the admit card for the 1st Semester UG Examinations 2026 for students of session 2025–29 (BA, BSc, BCom).

**Key Details:**

*   **University:** Lalit Narayan Mithila University (LNMU), Darbhanga
*   **Course:** Undergraduate (BA, BSc, BCom) – 4-year CBCS
*   **Session:** 2025–29
*   **Semester:** 1st Semester
*   **Admit Card Status:** Released
*   **Mode:** Online Download
*   **Official Website:** [lnmu.ac.in](lnmu.ac.in)
*   **Student Login:** [lnmuniversity.com](lnmuniversity.com)

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit the official LNMU website: [lnmu.ac.in](lnmu.ac.in).
2.  Navigate to the “Online Portal”, “UG Portal” or “Exam / Admit Card” section.
3.  Find the link for “UG 1st Semester Admit Card 2026 (Session 2025-29)”.
4.  Login using your University Roll Number and registered mobile number.
5.  Download and print the admit card in PDF format.
6.  Get the admit card verified by your college (if required).

**Important Instructions:**

*   Carry a printed copy of the admit card to the exam hall.
*   Reach the exam centre 30-45 minutes before the reporting time.
*   Carry a valid photo ID.
*   Do not carry prohibited items like mobile phones or calculators.

**Details on Admit Card:**

*   Student's Name & Parent's Name
*   Photograph & Signature
*   Roll Number & Registration Number
*   Course & Semester Details
*   Exam Centre & Dates
*   Subject Codes & Exam Timing

website_content.markdown_content:
## RRB Technician Admit Card 2026 OUT! 

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the admit card for the Technician Grade I (Signal) & Grade III exam under CEN 02/2025. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Release Date:** 2 March 2026
*   **Exam Dates:** 6, 9, 10 & 13 March 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 6238 Posts
*   **Advertisement No.:** CEN 02/2025
*   **Official Website:** rrbcdg.gov.in / Regional RRB sites

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit rrbcdg.gov.in or your regional RRB portal.
2.  Navigate to the "E-Call Letter" or "Latest Announcements" section.
3.  Click on "Download Admit Card for Technician CEN 02/2025".
4.  Enter Registration Number, Date of Birth, and Captcha Code.
5.  Download and print the admit card (2-3 copies recommended).

**Important Documents to Carry:**

*   Admit Card (printed copy)
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Blue/Black ballpoint pen

**Important Instructions:**

*   Check all details on the admit card immediately after download.
*   Report any discrepancies to RRB helpdesk within 24 hours.
*   Reach the exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time.
*   Entry closes 30 minutes before the exam starts.

website_content.title: JRHMS Specialist Medical Officer Recruitment 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## JRHMS Specialist Medical Officer Recruitment 2026

The Jharkhand Rural Health Mission Society (JRHMS) has announced a recruitment drive for 181 Specialist Medical Officer positions.

**Key Details:**

*   **Company:** Jharkhand Rural Health Mission Society (JRHMS)
*   **Post Name:** Specialist Medical Officer
*   **Number of Posts:** 181
*   **Advertisement Number:** 02/2026 (SMO BID)
*   **Salary:** Bid amount (maximum Rs. 3,00,000/- per month)
*   **Qualification:** MBBS degree with a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma from an NMC-recognized institution in relevant specialization (Gynecology & Obstetrics, General Surgery, Ophthalmology, Pathology, General Medicine, Orthopedics, Psychiatry, Dermatology, Radiology, Anaesthesia, ENT, Paediatrics, etc.).
*   **Age Limit:** 21 - 69 years (as of 01-03-2025)
*   **Application Mode:** Online
*   **Job Type:** Contractual
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 25 March 2026

**Selection Process:**

1.  Online bidding through Google Form
2.  Facility-wise shortlisting
3.  L1 (lowest bid) selection
4.  Tie-breaker criteria: PG Degree > Experience > Date of Birth > DoP rules
5.  Preference to PH and Reserved Category at same L1 rate
6.  Allotment to L2 if L1 declines

**Application Fee:** Nil for all categories.

**Important Dates:**

*   Last Date of Bid Submission: 25 March 2026
*   Age Limit as on: 1 March 2025

**Key Details:**

*   **Result Type:** Final Result (Merit List)
*   **Selection Stages:** Prelims → Mains → Personality Test
*   **Total Recommended Candidates:** 958
*   **Vacancies (Revised):** 1087
*   **Reserve List:** 258 candidates
*   **Topper (AIR 1):** Anuj Agnihotri

**Merit List Contains:**

*   Roll Number
*   Candidate Name
*   Rank (All India Rank - AIR)
*   Category (if applicable)
*   Recommended Services (IAS, IPS, IFS, etc.)

**Important Instructions:**

*   Download and save the merit list PDF.
*   Await service allocation details from DoPT.
*   Prepare for training at respective academies.
*   Keep original documents ready for verification.
*   Marksheet to be released later.

The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the results for the Junior Engineer (Civil, Mechanical & Electrical) Prelims Exam 2025-26 on **March 6th, 2026**.

**Exam Date:** December 3rd - 6th & 13th, 2025

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit [ssc.gov.in](https://ssc.gov.in).

3.  Click on the link for "Junior Engineer (Civil, Mechanical & Electrical) Examination, 2025 – Declaration of result of Paper-I".

**Key Details:**

*   **Selection Stages:** Paper-I → Paper-II → Document Verification
*   **Merit Lists:** Separate lists for Civil and Electrical/Mechanical Engineering.
*   **Cutoff Marks (Minimum):**
    *   UR: 30% (60 marks)
    *   OBC/EWS: 25% (50 marks)
    *   Others: 20% (40 marks)

**Important:** Qualified candidates should download the result PDFs, prepare for Paper-II, and keep original documents ready for verification.

**Links:**

*   [SSC JE Prelims Result Notice](https://ssc.gov.in)

*   [List-2 (Electrical/Mechanical Merit List)](https://ssc.gov.in)

The Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board has released the SSC Admit Card for the 2025-2026 academic session. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Course Name:** SSC
*   **Admit Card Type:** Admit Card
*   **Academic Session:** 2025-2026
*   **Exam Date:** 13-03-2026 to 09-04-2026

*   Mobile phones and other electronic devices are prohibited in the exam hall.

website_content.markdown_content:
## RBI Non-CSG Various Posts 2026 - Admit Card OUT!

The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released the admit card for various Non-CSG posts (Legal Officer, Manager Technical, Assistant Manager Rajbhasha, Protocol & Security).

**Important Dates:**

*   **Release Date:** 06 March 2026
*   **Exam Date:** 14 March 2026
*   **Application Start Date:** 06 February 2026
*   **Application Last Date:** 26 February 2026

**Total Vacancies:** 21

**How to Download:**

1.  Visit opportunities.rbi.org.in
2.  Navigate to the "Call Letters" or "Latest Announcements" section.
3.  Click on "RBI Non CSG Various Post Admit Card 2026".
4.  Enter your Registration Number/Roll Number and Password/Date of Birth.
5.  Download and print the admit card (2-3 copies).

**Documents Required:**

*   Admit Card
*   Valid Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Driving License, PAN Card, Passport)
*   Passport-size photographs (2 copies)
*   Black/blue ballpoint pen

**Important Instructions:**

*   Verify all details on the admit card.
*   Arrive at the exam center 45-60 minutes early.
*   No electronic devices allowed.

website_content.markdown_content:
## JKSSB Recruitment 2026 - 390+ Vacancies

The Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB) has announced a recruitment drive for **390** positions including Stock Assistant, Supervisor, and more.

**Key Details:**

*   **Company:** Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB)
*   **Posts:** Stock Assistant, Fisheries Development Assistant, Junior Supervisor, Assistant Handicrafts Training Officer, Works Supervisor, Supervisor, Motor Vehicle Inspector, Fitter, Greaser Washer, Mechanic, Stores Officer, Upholster
*   **Total Vacancies:** 390
*   **Salary:** Rs. 14,800/- to Rs. 113,500/- Per Month
*   **Qualification:** Matric to Graduate (varies by post)
*   **Age Limit:** 18 to 40 years (Relaxation for reserved categories)
*   **Application Start Date:** 27/01/2026
*   **Last Date to Apply:** 14-03-2026
*   **Website:** [www.jkssb.nic.in](www.jkssb.nic.in)

**Important Dates:**

*   Notification Date: 26.12.2025
*   Application Start: 27.01.2026
*   Application End: 14.03.2026

**Application Fee:**

*   General/OM: Rs. 600/- 
*   SC/ST/EWS/PwBD: Rs. 500/- 

**Selection Process:**

*   Written/OMR Examination (Merit-based)
*   Document Verification

**Domicile Requirement:** Candidates must be Domicile(s) of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir.

For detailed information and to apply, visit the official website.

website_content.title: India Post GDS 1st Merit List 2026
website_content.markdown_content:
## India Post GDS 1st Merit List 2026 OUT! 

The Department of Posts, India has released the 1st Merit List for 28,636 Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS) vacancies. The list was published on **6th March 2026**. 

**Key Details:**

*   **Recruiting Body:** Department of Posts, India
*   **Post Name:** Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS), BPM, ABPM etc.
*   **Result Type:** 1st Merit List / Shortlisted Candidates List
*   **Declaration Date:** 6th March 2026
*   **Application Period:** January - February 2026
*   **Total Vacancies:** 28,636
*   **Selection Basis:** Class 10 Marks
*   **Selection Stages:** Merit List → Document Verification → Medical Exam → Final Engagement

**How to Check:**

1.  Visit [indiapostgdsonline.gov.in](https://indiapostgdsonline.gov.in)
2.  Navigate to "GDS Online Engagement Schedule-I, January-2026" or "List-I of Shortlisted Candidates"
3.  Select your Postal Circle / State
4.  Download the PDF and search for your Registration Number/Name.

**Expected Cutoff (General):** 84%-94% (varies by circle)

**Important:** Download the merit list, prepare documents for verification, and check the official portal regularly for updates.
